name: Retrieve books with an empty database

testSteps.description: 1: Retrieve books with an empty database ({user_role=admin})

children.description: Given I am a admin user
When I send a GET request to retrieve the book list

restQuery.responseHeaders:
Set-Cookie: JSESSIONID=9655312F63A9B835A74C9686E3E1F069; Path=/; HttpOnly
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate
Pragma: no-cache
Expires: 0
X-Frame-Options: DENY
Content-Type: application/json
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
Date: Sat, 04 Jan 2025 04:31:49 GMT
Keep-Alive: timeout=60
Connection: keep-alive

children.description: Then the response status code should be 200
And the response should indicate an empty book list
